languages.original_text: "We have managed to reach a consensus on the root of the problem — the rest can be overlooked. He is not convinced by all my conclusions, but that is no terrible thing — he and I share a common path, but we each have our own methods of comprehending it."

languages.text: "Мы смогли достичь консенсуса по корню проблемы — остальным можно пренебречь. Не все мои выводы его устраивают, но в этом нет беды — у нас с ним общий путь, но способы постигать у каждого свои".

"We have managed to reach a consensus on the root of the problem — the rest can be overlooked. He is not convinced by all my conclusions, but that is no terrible thing — he and I share a common path, but we each have our own methods of comprehending it."
languages.original_text: "Мы смогли достичь консенсуса по корню проблемы — остальным можно пренебречь. Не все мои выводы его устраивают, но в этом нет беды — у нас с ним общий путь, но способы постигать у каждого свои".

traits.locale_text: "We have managed to reach a consensus on the root of the problem — the rest can be overlooked. He is not convinced by all my conclusions, but that is no terrible thing — he and I share a common path, but we each have our own methods of comprehending it."

"We have managed to reach a consensus on the root of the problem — the rest can be overlooked. He is not convinced by all my conclusions, but that is no terrible thing — he and I share a common path, but we each have our own methods of comprehending it."

"We have managed to reach a consensus on the root of the problem — the rest can be overlooked. He is not convinced by all my conclusions, but that is no terrible thing — he and I share a common path, but we each have our own methods of comprehending it."

languages.text: 「問題の根本については合意に至った。あとは見過ごせる。彼の結論は全て納得できないが、それは大したことではない。彼と私は共通の道を行くが、その理解の方法はそれぞれ異なる」
languages.original_text: "We have managed to reach a consensus on the root of the problem — the rest can be overlooked. He is not convinced by all my conclusions, but that is no terrible thing — he and I share a common path, but we each have our own methods of comprehending it."

traits.locale_text: 「問題の根本については合意に至った。あとは見過ごせる。彼の結論は全て納得できないが、それは大したことではない。彼と私は共通の道を行くが、その理解の方法はそれぞれ異なる。」

languages.text: “我们已就问题根源达成共识，其余的细枝末节皆可忽略不计。虽说他没有被我的结论完全说服，但这也不是什么可怕的事情。他和我的道路并无区别，我们只是有各自的理解。”
languages.original_text: "We have managed to reach a consensus on the root of the problem — the rest can be overlooked. He is not convinced by all my conclusions, but that is no terrible thing — he and I share a common path, but we each have our own methods of comprehending it."

traits.locale_text: “我们已就问题根源达成共识，其余的细枝末节皆可忽略不计。虽说他没有被我的结论完全说服，但这也不是什么可怕的事情。他和我的道路并无区别，我们只是有各自的理解。”

languages.text: « Nous avons réussi à atteindre un consensus sur la source du problème, le reste est sans importance. Même s'il trouve certaines de mes conclusions peu convaincantes, cela ne nous fera pas obstacle. Nous avons chacun nos propres méthodes pour appréhender la voie commune que nous suivons. »
languages.original_text: "We have managed to reach a consensus on the root of the problem — the rest can be overlooked. He is not convinced by all my conclusions, but that is no terrible thing — he and I share a common path, but we each have our own methods of comprehending it."

traits.locale_text: « Nous avons réussi à atteindre un consensus sur la source du problème, le reste est sans importance. Même s'il trouve certaines de mes conclusions peu convaincantes, cela ne nous fera pas obstacle. Nous avons chacun nos propres méthodes pour appréhender la voie commune que nous suivons. »

languages.text: «Hemos conseguido alcanzar un consenso sobre el origen del problema; podemos dejar pasar el resto. Mis conclusiones no le convencen en absoluto, pero eso no supone un problema: compartimos el mismo camino, pero ambos tenemos nuestro propia forma de comprenderlo».
languages.original_text: "We have managed to reach a consensus on the root of the problem — the rest can be overlooked. He is not convinced by all my conclusions, but that is no terrible thing — he and I share a common path, but we each have our own methods of comprehending it."

traits.locale_text: «Hemos conseguido alcanzar un consenso sobre el origen del problema; podemos dejar pasar el resto. Mis conclusiones no le convencen en absoluto, pero eso no supone un problema: compartimos el mismo camino, pero ambos tenemos nuestro propia forma de comprenderlo».

languages.text: "Sorunun temelinde bir fikir birliğine varmayı başardık, gerisi göz ardı edilebilir. Tüm sonuçlarıma ikna olmuş değil ama bu o kadar da kötü bir şey değil. O ve ben ortak bir yolu paylaşıyoruz ancak ikimizin de onu kavrama konusunda kendi yöntemlerimiz var."
languages.original_text: "We have managed to reach a consensus on the root of the problem — the rest can be overlooked. He is not convinced by all my conclusions, but that is no terrible thing — he and I share a common path, but we each have our own methods of comprehending it."

traits.locale_text: "Sorunun temelinde bir fikir birliğine varmayı başardık, gerisi göz ardı edilebilir. Tüm sonuçlarıma ikna olmuş değil ama bu o kadar da kötü bir şey değil. O ve ben ortak bir yolu paylaşıyoruz ancak ikimizin de onu kavrama konusunda kendi yöntemlerimiz var."

languages.text: "Wir haben eine Konsens hinsichtlich der Wurzel des Problems erreicht ... alles andere ist zu vernachlässigen. Er ist von meinen Rückschlüssen nicht überzeugt, aber das ist nicht schlimm ... er und ich folgen einem gemeinsamen Weg, wenden aber unterschiedliche Methoden an."
languages.original_text: "We have managed to reach a consensus on the root of the problem — the rest can be overlooked. He is not convinced by all my conclusions, but that is no terrible thing — he and I share a common path, but we each have our own methods of comprehending it."

traits.locale_text: "Wir haben eine Konsens hinsichtlich der Wurzel des Problems erreicht ... alles andere ist zu vernachlässigen. Er ist von meinen Rückschlüssen nicht überzeugt, aber das ist nicht schlimm ... er und ich folgen einem gemeinsamen Weg, wenden aber unterschiedliche Methoden an."
